title: Operations Officer (School) - JL
description:
Contract Duration: 1 Year

Job Description

We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Operations Officer to support public correspondence, stakeholder engagement, site operations, data management, and reporting functions.

Key Responsibilities

1. Public Correspondence

  • Draft clear, accurate, and timely responses to enquiries and feedback from members of the public

  • Ensure all replies are aligned with established policies and guidelines

2. Stakeholder Management

  • Manage and respond to queries from stakeholders, including schools, on matters related to school canteen operations and school bus services

3. Site Visits and Issue Resolution

  • Conduct site visits to schools to assess canteen operations and school bus services

  • Identify and report operational issues, and work with relevant parties to troubleshoot and resolve matters

  • Document findings, observations, and recommendations arising from site visits

4. Surveys and Feedback Collection

  • Assist in the planning, administration, and conduct of surveys

  • Compile survey responses and ensure accurate documentation of findings

5. Data Management and Reporting

  • Perform accurate data entry and maintain databases and records

  • Analyse data and prepare summaries, reports, and presentation materials for management review

6. Records Management

  • Maintain proper filing of documents in accordance with record-keeping requirements

  • Ensure information is organised, up-to-date, and easily retrievable

Requirements

  • Diploma in any discipline.

  • Strong written communication skills with the ability to draft clear and professional correspondence

  • Good interpersonal skills to engage stakeholders effectively

  • Meticulous, organised, and detail-oriented

  • Able to analyse data and prepare reports and presentations

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office applications (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)

  • Immediate Starters are preferred

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Justin Lee

postedCompany.description:
APBA TG Human Resource Pte Ltd

(a wholly owned subsidiary of the TG Group)


TG Group (“TG”) is a global workforce solutions provider with an international reach in over 50 markets across the globe. Headquartered in Singapore with Shanghai Foreign Service (Group) Co Ltd ("FSG") as a strategic shareholder, TG delivers a comprehensive suite of innovative human capital solutions to help our clients achieve greater business success.

TG adopts a future-centric approach where we aspire to be at the forefront of the evolution of the future of work. We believe that human capital is the greatest asset to any institution. With a wealth of experience in the Human Resources (HR) industry, we combine our international expertise and local know-how to deliver bespoke and innovative workforce solutions.

Our diverse portfolio of client-centric workforce solutions includes Contingent Workforce Management (CWM), Business Process Outsourcing (BPO), Permanent Placements, Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO), Professional Employer Organisation (PEO), and Payroll Process Outsourcing (PPO).
